nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Scaly-feathered weaver
nodes.summary: The scaly-feathered weaver (Sporopipes squamifrons), also known as the scaly-feathered finch, is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is found in Angola, Botswana, Namibia, South Africa, Zambia, and Zimbabwe. References External links Scaly-feathered Finch - Species text in Weaver Watch. (Scaly-feathered weaver = ) Scaly-feathered finch - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
nodes.shortSummary: The scaly-feathered weaver (Sporopipes squamifrons), also known as the scaly-feathered finch, is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae.…

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sporopipes
nodes.summary: Sporopipes（Sporopipes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Speckle-fronted weaver、Scaly-feathered weaver。
